description: Curated source-master input for the next Yomira source pack compilation. Files under definitions/ are source-pack-ready overlays; other entries document HTTP targets that need connector/profile work before they should be advertised as installable.

notes: Existing hand-authored config worked in testing.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms a simple Madara source at https://harimanga.me.
Keiyoushi marks this source NSFW, so the normalized definition does too.
Already present in the generated expanded pack.
Tracked here as a curated overlay so future master compilation preserves current Keiyoushi metadata and NSFW handling.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms MangaBox lineage at https://www.mangakakalot.gg.
Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition so it does not require an external bridge.
Browser Verification is declared because the existing hand-authored config marked the source as Cloudflare-sensitive.
Keiyoushi tracks this source under src/en/manganelo with user-facing name Manganato.
The source base URL was updated from the stale hand-authored value to https://www.natomanga.com.
Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition so it does not require an external bridge.
Keiyoushi confirms a custom HttpSource at https://mangakatana.com with NSFW enabled.
Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition and paired with native static script image-array parsing.
No external bridge or executable runtime is required.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms Hiperdex at https://hiperdex.com.
Normalized as a Madara Source Definition with a curated search card selector override.
Browser Verification is declared as a possible recovery path, but normal requests are attempted first.
The previously generated profile treated MangaBuddy as a theme connector, but the live site search redirects into a MangaK/Next.js reader flow.
Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition with static Next.js data fallback for chapter and page lists.
No external bridge or executable runtime is required.
Existing embedded config already covered MangaClash as a Madara source at https://mangaclash.com.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms MangaClash uses the Madara family with a MM/dd/yy chapter date format.
Live HTTP checks currently return a Cloudflare 403, so Browser Verification and Source Session Recovery are declared up front.
Promoted to the source repository as a declarative Source Definition so the iOS app can install it without an external bridge.
Added to the source master list rather than as an always-loaded bundled app source.
Runtime calls are handled by Yomira's built-in MangaDex connector engine only after the Source Definition is installed.
No external bridge or executable runtime is required.
Normalized from the existing Hentai20 selector config.
Marked 18+ and app-store-safe because it is declarative and contains no executable bridge code.
Browser Verification is declared as a possible recovery path, but normal requests are attempted first.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms a custom HttpSource at https://weebcentral.com with NSFW enabled.
Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition using the current search/detail/chapter/image endpoint hints.
Browser Verification and Source Session Recovery are declared up front because the previous hand-authored source was Cloudflare-sensitive.
Existing local source config was present but not part of the curated pack.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms a Madara source at https://madaradex.org with custom browser-like handling.
Browser Verification and Source Session Recovery are declared because direct requests currently return a Cloudflare challenge.
Previously only covered by the generated pack; now tracked as a curated overlay because live requests currently require Browser Verification.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms a direct Madara source at https://mangagg.com.
The shared Madara base was updated to find current AJAX chapter holder markup.
Existing local source config incorrectly treated KuraManga as Madara.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms a custom HttpSource at https://kuramanga.com.
Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition with JSON search and HTML detail/chapter/page selectors.
Already present in the generated expanded pack, but now tracked as a curated overlay for current AJAX chapter markup.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms a direct Madara source at https://www.manhwaden.com.
Live testing confirmed its chapter list loads through the per-detail /ajax/chapters route.

needsConnectorOrSelectorValidation.reason: Custom HTTP/API behavior is outside the current converted connector set. Needs native profile work instead of a blind selector import.

recommendedNextIteration: Device-validate Mangakakalot, Manganato, MangaKatana, Hiperdex, Hentai20, and Weeb Central search/detail/chapter/page routes after importing the curated source-master preview pack.
Review MangaFire separately because its Keiyoushi implementation is more custom than a direct declarative source profile.
